testcase.name: loads the checklist dashboard with seeded tasks
shows validation when task name is too short
adds a high priority test task
testcase.failure: [chromium] › checklist.spec.js:24:1 › adds a high priority test task ───────────────────────────── Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: getByText('High') Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: getByText('High') resolved to 3 elements: 1) aka getByLabel('Priority') 2) High aka getByText('High').nth(1) 3) High aka getByText('High').nth(2) Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByText('High') 28 | 29 | await expect(page.getByText('Validate payment error state')).toBeVisible(); > 30 | await expect(page.getByText('High')).toBeVisible(); | ^ 31 | await expect(page.getByTestId('total-count')).toHaveText('3 total'); 32 | }); 33 | at D:\Jenkins\app\tests\checklist.spec.js:30:40 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\checklist-adds-a-high-priority-test-task-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\checklist-adds-a-high-priority-test-task-chromium\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\test-results\checklist-adds-a-high-priority-test-task-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: marks a task complete and filters completed tasks
removes a task from the list
